flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Vance-Granville Community College fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (23.7% → 16.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Vance-Granville Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Vance-Granville Community College fell 50% between 2013 and 2016 ($9.5k → $4.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Vance-Granville Community College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (56.7% → 75.6%).
